summary: Testing blocked early: frontend crashes at boot due missing Supabase env, so admin camera overlay fixes could not be functionally validated.

critical.issue: Service responds on root but /docs and /openapi.json return 404; backend API contract for this task is not discoverable/testable from current environment.

ui_bugs.issue: Page renders blank and testids never mount because app throws runtime error at startup: 'supabaseUrl is required.'

integration_issues.flow: Admin login -> Admin dashboard -> camera overlay validation
integration_issues.issue: Blocked by missing VITE_SUPABASE_URL/VITE_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY at runtime; cannot execute face detection, overlay alignment, mirror, blur, and resize integration checks.

action_items: Provide valid runtime env vars (VITE_SUPABASE_URL, VITE_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY) in the running preview environment so app can boot.

After env fix, rerun full admin camera E2E for: box centering, unknown red-X centering, blur alignment, label alignment, mirrored preview alignment, responsive resize alignment, and start/stop regression.
Add/restore /app/memory/test_credentials.md (or equivalent) to allow authenticated admin flow testing per playbook.
critical_code_review_comments: Global app boot hard-crashes in src/lib/supabase.ts when env vars are missing because createClient is invoked with undefined inputs; this prevents any UI route from rendering.

faceOverlayGeometry.parseObjectPosition does not correctly handle keyword order variants like 'top left'/'bottom right' (first token is forced to x-axis parser), which can misalign overlays if object-position changes from default center.
Admin label is hardcoded to 'Zakkk' in CameraView for admin matches, which can desync displayed identity from matched record metadata.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Attempted UI automation at /admin. Selectors did not appear due startup crash. Console captured 'PAGE ERROR: supabaseUrl is required.' Camera overlay scenarios were not runnable. Use same console log path for verification baseline.
rca of the issue: Repro: open http://127.0.0.1:3000/admin -> blank page. Console logs show 'supabaseUrl is required.' Root cause: src/lib/supabase.ts constructs Supabase client at module load from import.meta.env values; environment in current runtime lacks VITE_SUPABASE_URL (and likely VITE_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY), causing immediate exception before React mounts. Mitigation: ensure runtime env injection in dev/preview container or guard client initialization and render explicit config error screen instead of crashing entire app.
